name: Navigating the Data Frontier in Science Assessment: Advancing Data Augmentation Strategies for Machine Learning Applications with Generative Artificial Intelligence
summary: Study comparing additional real student data, chatbot paraphrases, and chatbot-generated synthetic responses for machine scoring of undergraduate chemistry reasoning.
open_access_metadata_note: ScienceDirect, DOAJ, OpenAlex, Semantic Scholar, Crossref, Unpaywall, and CORE metadata identify the article as open access, but no article body or PDF was retrievable from this workspace on 2026-06-03.

access_attempts.notes: Static page exposed bibliographic metadata, open-access status, DOI, abstract, and keywords, but not full-text methods/results tables.
Direct PDF and headless browser requests returned ScienceDirect CAPTCHA/IP-block pages rather than a PDF.
Elsevier text-mining endpoint returned core metadata only without an API key; full-view requests failed authentication and text/plain was not available.
CORE found a DOAJ metadata record for the DOI but no download URL, repository URL, or source full-text URL.
